steps.title: Use the time signal
steps.content: "Currently" signals that the sentence is describing the frog's present-day range. The verb must be in the present tense and agree with the singular subject "range."

steps.title: Reject past and future tenses
steps.content: B places the range in the past. C uses future perfect, which points to completion before a future time. D uses past perfect, which points to completion before another past event. The answer is A.
